model.note: 25% fee-switch GP on LP fees + 0.30bps frontend fee; volume bootstrapped from 2021+ monthly history
Card GP = GDV × 135bps take × margin; staking GP = ETH bootstrap; vault flat
50% of entity GP used for buybacks; 0 scheduled unlocks until Jupiter announces reserve plan

data.name: Sky

model.note: GP = gross income - savings-rate cost - stUSDS expense. NP = GP - OPEX. USDS growth path: money-market TVL returns × 0.65 dampener, capped ±8%/+10% monthly. DAI supply flat. Treasury = cumulative positive NP. Market data locked 2026-05-08.

caveats: Market data (spot, supply, financials) locked at 2026-05-08; re-run sky_data_collection to refresh.
USDS growth is modeled on broad money-market TVL returns dampened by 0.65 — Sky may diverge from sector.
No buybacks or SKY supply reduction modeled; treasury accumulates cash only.
Savings rate (3.65%) and USDS savings penetration (81.2%) are point-in-time inputs.
